fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period shown in the line.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the period that you want to view.

fields.name: Prepaid Income
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total income (in LCY) that has been posted to the prepaid account for the service contract in the periods specified in the Period Start field.

fields.name: Posted Income
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total income (in LCY) that has been posted to the general ledger for the service contract in the periods specified in the Period Start field.

fields.name: Posted Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of the service contract based on its service usage in the periods specified in the Period Start field.

fields.name: Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of discount being applied for the line.

fields.name: Profit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the profit (posted incom0e minus posted cost in LCY) for the service contract in the periods specified in the Period Start field.

fields.name: Profit %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the profit percentage for the service contract in the periods specified in the Period Start field.
